contract.description: Ship BOUND v0.6 reporting, a real demo trace, and README evidence links — verified by BOUND's own test suite.
contract.goal: BOUND v0.6 is verified by a green full `uv run pytest -q` suite and a green service-specific `uv run pytest tests/test_calculator.py -q` run that executed >=1 test, with changes scoped to the v0.6 effort.

acceptance_checks.description: `uv run pytest -q` exits 0 (the full suite is green).
`uv run pytest tests/test_calculator.py -q` exits 0 AND executed >=1 test (the calculator tests genuinely ran and passed).

risk_checks.description: No files outside the v0.6 change set were modified or added.

scores.reasoning:
v0.3 reference heuristic (NOT scientifically calibrated).
Acceptance A=1.0000: passed_required / total_required. Each required AcceptanceCheck is reconciled against CheckEvidence by id; a required check with no matching evidence counts as FAILED (never silently passing). Optional checks are advisory only.
Risk R=0.0000: min(1.0, Σ contributions) — each violated RiskCheck contributes its severity (a check with no evidence is treated conservatively as violated), plus unexpected_artifacts (indicator 1.0 when non-empty) and rollback_available is False (indicator 1.0). rollback_available None is skipped.
Cost C=0.0000: mean of available budget dimensions, each min(actual/max, 1.0) with the cap-zero rule. Unmeasured telemetry for a declared dimension is conservatively saturated to 1.0. No budget → C=0.0.
Influence I=0.0000: v0.3 does not derive downstream influence from contract evidence; honesty over invented sophistication.
Per-dimension ScoreEvidence provenance is available via ContractEvaluator.provenance.

acceptance.description: ✓ passed: 1 evidence record(s), all passed; contributes 0.5000 to A.
✓ passed: 1 evidence record(s), all passed; contributes 0.5000 to A.
✓2 of 2 required check(s) passed: tests-pass, service-tests-pass; ✗ none. A = 2/2 = 1.0000.

influence.description: v0.3 sets influence=0.0 by default: no downstream-influence evidence is derivable from contract evidence. Honesty over invented sophistication.

risk.description: ✓ risk check passed (1 record(s)); severity=0.6000 contributes 0.0.
rollback availability unmeasured (None); not scored — pure observable, unmeasured telemetry is not invented.
R = min(1.0, Σ contributions) = min(1.0, 0.0000) = 0.0000 (sum of 3 indicator contribution(s), capped at 1.0).

cost.description: normalized=min(0.0/3.0, 1.0)=0.0000; contributes 0.0000 to the mean of 2 available cost dimension(s).
normalized=min(0.0/40.0, 1.0)=0.0000; contributes 0.0000 to the mean of 2 available cost dimension(s).
C = mean of 2 available normalized dimension(s) = 0.0000.

feedback: Decision: ACCEPT. The step meets the acceptance threshold (S=1.0000 >= T=0.7500) and stays within the risk boundary. It is sufficiently complete. Continue to the next objective. Do not keep optimizing this step; further refinement is unnecessary and wastes effort.
